// AppMappings.g.cs
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
partial class AppMappings
{
    public static global::Order Map(global::OrderRequest src)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(src);
        var __dst = new global::Order(
            Id: src.Id,
            Notes: src.Notes
        );
        return __dst;
    }
}
